# AI Context for @json-express/docs-swagger

Automatically generates an OpenAPI 3.0 spec and mounts a Swagger UI.

## Setup
```typescript
import { DocsSwagger } from '@json-express/docs-swagger';
kernel.registerDocProvider(new DocsSwagger({ path: '/docs' }));
```

## AI Instruction
- Do not manually write a `swagger.json`. This plugin automatically derives the OpenAPI spec from the `defineModel` schemas registered in the kernel.
